message:
feat: visual effects showcase, markdown rendering, theme, and widget improvements

Concurrent agent work: expand the demo showcase, extras, rendering,
and widget layers with incremental improvements:

- ftui-demo-showcase/visual_effects.rs: update visual effects showcase screen
- ftui-extras/markdown.rs: improve markdown rendering support
- ftui-extras/theme.rs: extend extras theme definitions
- ftui-render/presenter.rs: refine frame presentation logic
- ftui-tty/lib.rs: TTY layer adjustments
- ftui-widgets/log_viewer.rs: improve log viewer widget

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
